calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

John P. Zanghi, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Conrad House, Incorporated.
Witness Markyle Henderson sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Sean Alexander.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2431 Post Street, Unit #2, City and County of San Francisco, California 94115.

Damages $0
Holdover damages $1462.65
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $290.00
for a Total Judgment of $1752.65

Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Steve Collier; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Conard House, Inc. is present. Represented by.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sean Alexander is present.
Attorney Michael Spalding for defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-19-2016 remains on calendar. (JPT/501)
